char_overview: Vorathis, a Pact-Devourer 恶魔 summoned by a former 游魂 seeking revenge against the 狩灵协会. When the summoner was mortally wounded in combat, the 恶魔 turned and consumed him, breaking the blood contract. Unbound from any pact, it underwent a catastrophic metamorphosis, expanding its 吞噬结界 and elevating from 梦魇级 to 灾厄级.
char_looks: 3.5m (initial) / 6m (post-consumption). A towering humanoid with obsidian-like carapace, veins of crimson 灵力 pulsing between armor plates. A horizontal maw splits its torso, lined with rows of jagged fangs that shear through steel, revealing a churning vortex of devoured 灵力 residue within. Five semi-transparent chain-tendrils extend from its back, each tipped with a fragment of the summoner's finger bones. After devouring the summoner, its carapace cracks open along the spine, releasing a 吞噬结界 that confines and drains 灵力 from everything within range.
char_abilities: 噬渊之喉: The horizontal maw across its chest is its primary weapon. It can emit a deafening roar that stuns and intimidates targets within range. Its jagged fangs shear through steel and crush metal with tremendous bite force. It can spray a vile, molten 灵力 that glows with volcanic heat, burning flesh on contact and seeping into 灵力回路 to block their flow in those it strikes. The spray requires a brief cooldown to rebuild internal pressure between volleys.; 吞噬结界: A hemispherical barrier centered on Vorathis. Physically confines targets within range and passively drains 灵力 from all living beings inside, feeding the absorbed energy into Vorathis's regeneration. The barrier can be breached with sustained concentrated attacks at a single point.
char_mission: Break free from the ironworks, devour all 灵力 sources in its path, and unleash its maw upon the unsuspecting city beyond.
